summary: CheckoutModal feature testing complete. All existing tests pass. New tests added for checkout modal with billing/shipping fields. Backend tests updated to include required billing data for WooCommerce orders.

checkout_modal_opens.notes: Clicking Checkout in CartDrawer closes drawer and opens CheckoutModal after 300ms

checkout_order_summary.notes: Order summary shows cart items, quantities, and total in Euro

checkout_billing_fields.notes: Billing fields visible: firstName, lastName, email, phone

checkout_shipping_fields.notes: Shipping fields visible: address, city, postcode, country

checkout_order_notes.notes: Order notes textarea visible and fillable

checkout_form_submission.notes: Form can be filled. Backend accepts full billing/shipping data and creates WC order

backend_checkout_billing_data.notes: POST /api/wc/checkout accepts billing_phone, billing_address_1, billing_city, billing_postcode, billing_country, order_notes

woocommerce_order_billing_shipping.notes: WooCommerce order includes billing and shipping address from checkout request

seed_data_creation: Tests use unique UUIDs/timestamps for session IDs. Cleanup in test teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CheckoutModal fully tested. Cart-checkout flow works end-to-end. WooCommerce checkout now requires valid billing email - tests updated accordingly.
